name: Hot & Sour Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken broth, water, mushrooms, cornstarch, soy sauce, vinegar, and pepper sauce in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to boil over high heat, stirring constantly until slightly thickened.
3. Gradually pour egg into boiling soup, stirring continuously in one direction.
4. Remove from heat; stir in green onions.
5. Garnish with additional chopped onions or cilantro, as desired.
6. Serve immediately.
